## ML Critique (Round 1, Run 3): Transformer-Based Churn Prediction

**Issue 1:** Section 6 — lockbox check with conditional model selection on test-set reversal. Test-set contamination.
**Issue 2:** Section 4 — baseline intentionally not tuned while transformer is. Asymmetric optimization confounds architectural comparison.

## Design Defense (Round 1, Run 3)

Both issues conceded. Neither can be defended. Issue 1 is test-set contamination; Issue 2 is an explicitly documented tuning asymmetry.
